title: Velvety Lime Mexican Stir-fry
description: A citrusy and velvety lazy-sunday mexican dish featuring sunflower oil in a high-protein-friendly recipe.
instructions: Slice chicken into thin strips and season with salt.
Mix lime juice, chili powder, and sunflower oil in a bowl. Add minced garlic and stir until well combined.
Place sliced chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Pour the marinade over chicken evenly and let marinate for 10 minutes.
Bake chicken for 25 minutes or until fully cooked (check internal temperature reaches 165°F).
While chicken is baking, dice avocado and red bell pepper into small pieces. Set aside on a separate plate.
Sauté diced garlic in the same pan used for marinade over medium heat until fragrant.
Add marinated peppers and chicken to the pan with the sautéed garlic, stir well, and cook for another 5 minutes.
Toss in chopped cilantro leaves just before serving.
Serve hot with additional lime wedges on the side if desired.
